# Drew Belczak — Freelance Web Designer for Small Businesses

## Identity

- **Name:** Drew Belczak
- **Role:** Freelance Web Designer & Developer
- **Location:** Buffalo, New York (WNY)
- **Website:** https://drew.belczak.net
- **Email:** belczakdrew@gmail.com
- **Social:** @dw_b18 (Twitter/X, Instagram)

## What I Do

I design and build fast, modern, conversion-focused websites for small and local businesses. Every site is custom-coded from scratch — no templates, no page builders, no WordPress bloat. I focus on clean design, mobile performance, and helping clients attract more customers online.

### Target Audience

- Small business owners in Buffalo and Western New York
- Local restaurants, bars, cafes, and hospitality businesses
- Fitness studios, gyms, and wellness centers
- Law firms, accountants, consultants, and professional services
- Freelancers and creatives needing portfolio sites
- Any local business needing a modern, fast website

## Services

### Custom Website Design
- Hand-coded HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
- No templates, no page builders, no WordPress
- Each project built from scratch to client specifications

### Landing Pages
- High-converting landing pages for local businesses
- Lead capture and call-to-action focused design
- Fast load times for better conversion rates

### Portfolio & Showcase Sites
- Personal portfolios for freelancers and creatives
- Business showcasing work, services, and testimonials
- Clean, minimal design that highlights content

### Additional Services
- Mobile-responsive builds for all screen sizes
- Scroll animations and interactive UI effects (GSAP)
- SEO-ready site structure and meta optimization
- Website performance optimization
- Custom cursor effects and micro-interactions

## Skills & Technologies

### Core Skills
- HTML5 & CSS3 (modern layouts, flexbox, grid)
- JavaScript (vanilla JS, no frameworks required)
- UI/UX Design principles
- Responsive/mobile-first design
- Typography and color theory
- Performance optimization

### Tools & Libraries
- GSAP (GreenSock Animation Platform) for scroll-driven animations
- Google Fonts (Inter and variable fonts)
- Vercel for hosting and deployment

### Knowledge
- SEO fundamentals and best practices
- Web accessibility basics
- Conversion rate optimization
- Page speed optimization

## Portfolio / Demo Work

Real projects built to showcase range across industries (all live at https://drew.belczak.net):

### Noir Bistro
- **Type:** Upscale restaurant website
- **Style:** Dark, elegant, sophisticated
- **Theme:** French cuisine, fine dining
- **URL:** https://drew.belczak.net/demos/restaurant/

### Nexus Dynamics
- **Type:** AI workstation product site
- **Style:** Dark, editorial, tech-focused
- **Theme:** AI hardware, innovative technology
- **URL:** https://drew.belczak.net/demos/AI%20Computer/

### APEX CrossFit
- **Type:** Gym and fitness studio website
- **Style:** Bold, high-energy, dynamic
- **Theme:** CrossFit, strength training, fitness community
- **URL:** https://drew.belczak.net/demos/gym/

### Sterling & Associates
- **Type:** Law firm website
- **Style:** Corporate, professional, trustworthy
- **Theme:** Legal services, navy and gold color scheme
- **URL:** https://drew.belczak.net/demos/lawfirm/

## Why Choose Me

### No Templates
Every site is built from scratch. Your website will not look like anyone else's.

### Fast Performance
Custom code means no bloated plugins or unnecessary JavaScript. Sites load fast.

### Mobile-First
All sites are fully responsive and optimized for mobile users.

### Local Business Focus
I understand small business needs — practical, affordable, conversion-focused sites.

### Modern Design
Clean, contemporary aesthetics with scroll animations and interactive elements.

## Process

1. **Discovery** — We discuss your business, goals, and target audience
2. **Design** — I create a custom design tailored to your brand
3. **Development** — Hand-coded, optimized HTML/CSS/JS
4. **Launch** — Deploy to fast hosting (Vercel)
